# OpenCPO — Open Source EV Charging Platform

> The only EV charging platform where chargers are invisible on the internet.

OpenCPO is an open source, Apache 2.0 licensed EV charging platform built with zero trust architecture. It provides a complete Charge Point Operator (CPO) stack: OCPP Central System, admin dashboard, driver-facing PWA, site controller, charger simulator, and compliance tester.

## Key Features

- **Zero Trust Networking**: Chargers connect via WireGuard/Tailscale mesh VPN. No public endpoints.
- **Built-in PKI**: Own Root CA, CPO Sub-CA, MO Sub-CA. Per-device certificates, not shared passwords.
- **Mutual TLS (mTLS)**: Both sides verify identity on every connection.
- **ISO 15118 Plug & Charge**: Full PKI hierarchy for app-less, card-less charging.
- **OCPP 1.6 + 2.0.1**: Dual-protocol Central System with profile-driven charger compatibility.
- **OCPI Roaming**: Standard roaming protocol support for cross-network charging.
- **Skinnable Driver App**: PWA with theme system. Create custom skins with Google Stitch.
- **NIS2 Compliant by Design**: Encrypted comms, verified identity, audit trails.
- **Charger Simulator**: Virtual charger farm with 18 stress test scenarios.
- **Self-hosted**: Your infrastructure, your data, no vendor lock-in.
- **€0 License Cost**: Apache 2.0, free forever.

## Components

- **OpenCPO Core** — OCPP 1.6 + 2.0.1 Central System (Python/FastAPI)
- **OpenCPO Admin** — CPO admin dashboard (FastAPI + Jinja2 + HTMX)
- **OpenCPO Charge** — Driver-facing PWA (FastAPI + skinnable themes)
- **OpenCPO Bastion** — Raspberry Pi site controller (zero-trust bridge)
- **OpenCPO Farm** — Virtual charger simulator
- **OpenCPO Tester** — OCPP compliance test suite
- **OpenCPO Profiles** — Charger compatibility profiles

## Links

- Website: https://opencpo.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/opencpo
- Documentation: https://demo.opencpo.io/docs
- Discord: https://discord.gg/opencpo
- License: Apache 2.0

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/opencpo/opencpo
cd opencpo && ./setup.sh
docker compose up
```

## Who Made This

Built by Stroomlijnen B.V. (https://stroomlijnen.nl), a Dutch CPO that deploys DC fast chargers at theater venues and commercial locations. OpenCPO is production code from a team charging real vehicles every day.

## Comparison

OpenCPO is the only platform that combines zero trust networking, built-in PKI, mutual TLS, ISO 15118, and open source licensing. Commercial alternatives (AMPECO, has-to-be, ChargePoint) are closed-source, cloud-only SaaS with shared passwords and exposed endpoints.
